chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 203 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh is present and files statements on behalf of SHO PS C-Section, Sukkur and SSP, Sukkur, respectively, which are taken on record. The Police officer present in Court submits that Mst. Ashraf Khatoon, the alleged abductee in Crime No.134 of 2025 of Police Station ‘C’ Section, Sukkur has now been recovered; and her 161, Cr.PC statement was recorded, wherein she has supported the contents of the FIR; however, he will be produced before the concerned Magistrate for recording her 164, CrPC statement. He also undertakes that the absconding accused will be arrested. In view of such position, this Petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to arrest the absconding accused and produce them before the Court of law, having jurisdiction. Judge ARBROHI
